name: Generate JSON-LD FAQPage schema from an HTML FAQ section
prompt: Read the FAQ page in faq-page.html and generate a valid JSON-LD structured data file called faq-schema.json for the FAQ content. The schema must use schema.org vocabulary and include: @context (schema.org), @type (FAQPage), and mainEntity as an array of Question objects. Each Question must have @type (Question), name (the question text), and acceptedAnswer (with @type Answer and text containing the answer). Extract all 5 questions and their answers from the HTML.

criteria.description: Output file created and valid JSON
5 Question objects with correct types and answers
